classifications.phrase: GDP is expected to have declined materially in the September quarter
This setback to the economic expansion in Australia is expected to be only temporary
Hours worked declined by nearly 4 per cent in August
inflation is running at around 1¾ per cent
wages are increasing at just 1.7 per cent
It will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the 2…
this condition will not be met before 2024

payload.rationale: The statement emphasizes economic weakness from Delta lockdowns, subdued inflation and wage growth well below target, and commits to maintaining low rates until 2024, all signaling a dovish stance focused on supporting recovery and employment.
